name: butter-workflow
description: Issue-based spec-driven agentic development workflow for Claude Code and Codex handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Issue-based SDD workflow for Claude Code and Codex
interface.longDescription: Butter Workflow guides agents through issue intake, scoped planning, implementation, review handoff, and preference capture using repository state files that work across Claude Code and Codex.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $butter-workflow-start with this issue link and context.
